creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

I was hoping this was gone with my recent patches, but apparently it's not...

The failure you get is a result of the previous version libs being used during compilation of a new version.

Quick and dirty fix would be to remove old version before building new one.

22:06:02 runner cc default/source4/heimdal/lib/vers/print_version_131.o default/source4/heimdal_build/version_131.o default/source4/heimdal/kuser/kgetcred_138.o -o /usr/ports/net/samba41/work/samba-4.1.17/bin/default/source4/heimdal_build/samba4kgetcred **-L/usr/local/lib** -fstack-protector -Wl,-no-undefined -Wl,--export-dynamic -pthread -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-rpath,/usr/ports/net/samba41/work/samba-4.1.17/bin/shared -Wl,-rpath,/usr/ports/net/samba41/work/samba-4.1.17/bin/shared/private -Ldefault/lib/replace -Ldefault/source4/heimdal_build -Wl,-Bdynamic -lkrb5-samba4 -lroken-samba4 -lasn1-samba4 -lhcrypto-samba4 -lreplace -lheimntlm-samba4 -lheimbase-samba4 -lcom_err-samba4 -lhx509-samba4 -lwind-samba4 -lutil -lrt -lexecinfo -lcrypt

That -L/usr/local/lib shouldn't be there. Are you sure you don't alter CFLAGS/CPPFLAGS/LDFLAGS in your environment in /etc/make.conf?
